section.heading: Mid-Atlantic Regional Commission.11 So in original. The period probably should not appear.
section.chapeau: The region of the Mid-Atlantic Regional Commission shall include the following counties:

paragraph.heading: Delaware.—
paragraph.content: Each county in the State of Delaware.

paragraph.heading: Maryland.—
paragraph.content: Each county in the State of Maryland that is not already served by the Appalachian Regional Commission.

paragraph.heading: Pennsylvania.—
paragraph.content: Each county in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania that is not already served by the Appalachian Regional Commission.
